goals.description: TX single byte: start bit (0), DATA_WIDTH data bits LSB-first, 1 stop bit (1)
goals.rtl_check: Sample tx output pin over baud tick periods; verify bit pattern matches expected frame

goals.description: RX single byte: start detect, data bits LSB-first, stop bit verification, byte in RXDATA
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx pin with valid UART frame; read RXDATA; verify data matches

goals.description: TX byte with even parity: parity bit correctly computed
goals.rtl_check: Sample tx output; verify parity bit matches XOR of data bits

goals.description: RX byte with odd parity: correct parity accepted without error
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx with correct odd parity; verify STAT.parity_err=0

goals.description: RX parity error: wrong parity detected and flagged
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx with wrong parity; verify STAT.parity_err=1, RXDATA still valid

goals.description: RX framing error: stop bit low detected and flagged
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx with stop=0; verify STAT.frame_err=1

goals.description: RX overrun: 17th byte discarded when FIFO full
goals.rtl_check: Fill RX FIFO to capacity; drive one more byte; verify overrun_err=1

goals.description: TX no underrun during normal back-to-back frames
goals.rtl_check: Send multiple bytes back-to-back; verify STAT.underrun_err=0

goals.description: Loopback: TX bytes appear in RX FIFO
goals.rtl_check: Enable loopback; write TXDATA; read RXDATA; verify match

goals.description: Break send: tx held low for one frame duration then self-clears
goals.rtl_check: Set break_send=1; measure tx low time; verify CTRL.break_send returns to 0

goals.description: TX/RX with 2 stop bits configured
goals.rtl_check: Configure stop_bits=1; verify TX sends 2 stop bits; RX accepts 2 stop bits

goals.description: Interrupt on TX FIFO empty: INTPEND asserts, uart_irq asserts, W1C clears
goals.rtl_check: Enable tx_empty interrupt; let TX FIFO drain; check INTPEND and uart_irq; W1C

goals.description: Interrupt on RX not empty: INTPEND asserts, W1C clears
goals.rtl_check: Enable rx_not_empty interrupt; drive byte; check INTPEND; W1C

goals.description: DATA_WIDTH=5: correct serialization of 5-bit frames
goals.rtl_check: Set DATA_WIDTH=5; verify TX sends 5 data bits; RX receives 5 data bits

goals.description: FIFO full/empty flags track correctly
goals.rtl_check: Fill/drain FIFOs; verify STAT flags match expected levels

goals.description: Spurious start bit rejected: no byte captured, no error
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx low then high before mid-bit; verify RX FSM returns to IDLE

goals.description: Baud rate change mid-operation: current frame at old rate, next at new
goals.rtl_check: Start TX frame; change BAUD during frame; measure bit periods

goals.description: CTRL register read/write at offset 0x00
goals.rtl_check: Write pattern to CTRL; read back; verify all fields

goals.description: STAT register read-only at offset 0x04
goals.rtl_check: Read STAT; verify live flags; attempt write; verify no change

goals.description: BAUD register read/write at offset 0x08, reset=324
goals.rtl_check: Reset; read BAUD=324; write new value; read back

goals.description: TXDATA write-only at offset 0x0C pushes to TX FIFO
goals.rtl_check: Write TXDATA; verify TX FIFO level increases; read returns 0

goals.description: RXDATA read-only at offset 0x10 pops from RX FIFO
goals.rtl_check: Push byte to RX FIFO; read RXDATA; verify correct byte and FIFO level decrease

goals.description: INTEN register read/write at offset 0x14
goals.rtl_check: Write INTEN pattern; read back; verify all 5 enable bits

goals.description: INTPEND W1C at offset 0x18: write-1-to-clear pending bits
goals.rtl_check: Trigger interrupt; verify INTPEND set; write 1; verify cleared; write 0; verify no effect

goals.description: CLR_STAT W1C at offset 0x1C: clears sticky error flags
goals.rtl_check: Trigger frame_err; verify STAT.frame_err=1; write CLR_STAT bit 0; verify cleared

goals.description: Debug counters at offsets 0x20-0x2C: read-only, free-running, wrapping
goals.rtl_check: Transmit/receive bytes; read DBG_BYTES_TX/RX; verify increment

goals.description: PSLVERR asserted for addresses >= 0x30 with PREADY=1
goals.rtl_check: Access offset 0x30, 0x34, 0xFF; verify PSLVERR=1 and PREADY=1

goals.description: PREADY asserted in access phase for valid addresses
goals.rtl_check: Perform APB read/write; verify PREADY timing

goals.description: Reserved fields read as 0 and ignore writes
goals.rtl_check: Write all-ones to CTRL; read back; verify bits 31:7 are 0

goals.description: TX line is high (mark) when idle
goals.rtl_check: After reset, verify tx=1; after TX frame complete, verify tx=1

goals.description: TX data bits are sent LSB-first
goals.rtl_check: Write 0x01 to TXDATA; verify tx bit sequence: start,1,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,stop

goals.description: RX input passes through 2-FF synchronizer before sampling
goals.rtl_check: Verify rx_sync_1 and rx_sync_2 flop chain in RTL

goals.description: RX samples at oversample count 7 for mid-bit detection
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx; verify oversample counter; check sample timing

goals.description: Baud tick period = (baud_div + 1) * OVERSAMPLE PCLK cycles
goals.rtl_check: Set baud_div=324; measure baud tick period in PCLK cycles

goals.description: BAUD register change takes effect at next frame boundary
goals.rtl_check: Change BAUD during active TX frame; verify current frame unchanged

goals.description: Break duration = full frame (start+data+parity+stop bits)
goals.rtl_check: Set break_send; count PCLK cycles of tx=0; verify = frame_length * baud_period

goals.description: Loopback connects tx to rx synchronizer after 2-FF stage
goals.rtl_check: Enable loopback; verify internal mux routes tx to rx_sync input

goals.description: uart_irq = OR of all enabled pending interrupt sources
goals.rtl_check: Enable one interrupt source; trigger; verify uart_irq=1; disable; verify uart_irq=0

goals.description: uart_irq is active-high level, deasserts when all sources cleared
goals.rtl_check: Trigger multiple interrupts; clear all; verify uart_irq=0

goals.description: Byte pushed to RX FIFO even on frame error (if space available)
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx with bad stop bit; read RXDATA; verify byte present and frame_err=1

goals.description: Byte pushed to RX FIFO even on parity error (if space available)
goals.rtl_check: Drive rx with wrong parity; read RXDATA; verify byte present and parity_err=1

goals.description: Overrun: received byte discarded when RX FIFO full
goals.rtl_check: Fill RX FIFO; drive byte; verify FIFO count unchanged; verify overrun_err=1

goals.description: Underrun: TX frame aborted, tx returns to idle (mark)
goals.rtl_check: Force TX FIFO empty during frame; verify underrun_err=1 and tx=1

goals.description: Sticky error flags remain set until CLR_STAT W1C
goals.rtl_check: Trigger frame_err; verify persists; trigger again; verify still set; CLR_STAT; verify cleared

goals.description: Debug counters wrap at 0xFFFFFFFF
goals.rtl_check: Set counter near max; trigger event; verify wrap

goals.description: Async reset clears all architectural state
goals.rtl_check: Configure and activate UART; assert reset; verify all state cleared
